arts.ttl: Inter Miami star Lionel Messi makes 'unenjoyable' admission over PSG stint
arts.sum: Inter Miami star Lionel Messi opens up about his 'enjoyable' two-year Paris Saint-Germain stay prior to his move to the MLS in 2023.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Enter Transfer Race for €50M-Rated Arsenal, PSG Target Amid Contract Dispute
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to part ways with Randal Kolo Muani clears the way for the club to find a new No. 9 to partner with Gonçalo Ramos up front this summer. Juventus forward Dusan Vlahovic is one of the potential targets. According to a recent report from CaughtOffside, PSG plans to discuss his future in […] The post Aston Villa Enter Transfer Race for €50M-Rated Arsenal, PSG Target Amid Contract Dispute appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Willing to Edge PSG for €22M-per-Year Target as Jorginho Replacement
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, even coming close to signing him last summer. Now, the Parisians are revisiting the opportunity, hoping to seal the deal this time around. Journalists Christian Falk reported this week that PSG are showing strong interest in Kimmich as the veteran has yet to extend his contract […] The post Arsenal Willing to Edge PSG for €22M-per-Year Target as Jorginho Replacement appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Messi "wasn't happy on a daily basis" at PSG
arts.sum: Eight-time Men's Ballon d'Or winner Lionel Messi says he "didn't enjoy" playing for French club Paris St-Germain during his two-year spell and was "unhappy."

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi: Inter Miami saved me from PSG nightmare
arts.sum: Lionel Messi has opened up on his 'unenjoyable' time at Paris Saint-Germain and his transfer to Inter Miami in a rare interview. He left after just two years to move to MLS where he linked up with the Inter Miami franchise of former PSG midfielder David Beckham.

arts.ttl: Messi "wasn't happy on a daily basis" at PSG
arts.sum: Eight-time Men's Ballon d'Or winner Lionel Messi says he "didn't enjoy" playing for French club Paris St-Germain during his two-year spell and was "unhappy."

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi reveals he had ‘hard time adapting’ to life at Paris St Germain
arts.sum: The 37-year-old joined Major League Soccer club Inter Miami from PSG in July 2023 after a troubled period in the French capital.

arts.ttl: Fabián Ruiz says PSG ‘more united’ following Kylian Mbappé, Lionel Messi, and Neymar’s exit
arts.sum: In an interview with Movistar, Fabián Ruiz (28) reflected on the impact that the departures of Paris Saint-Germain’s former superstars Lionel Messi, Neymar, and Kylian Mbappé have had on the…

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 24: PSG look to extend their unbeaten run against Lille
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 24 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

arts.ttl: Neymar makes outlandish claim on how he 'taught' Lionel Messi - 'Are you crazy?'
arts.sum: Neymar and Lionel Messi are close friends after being team-mates for many years and the Brazilian has now taken some credit for the Argentine's superb penalty-taking technique in his career
